creator: rmgls@free.fr
text:
1:	wpa_supplicant (included in the base system), blanks the ssid

2:	more tedious: wpa_supplicant does not associate to an AP
when this one is hidden even indicating the bssid and scan_ssid=1
in the config file.

tested on a sony laptop S5 (iwi builtin) and a smp asus desktop (ath pci card).
When the AP is NOT hidden all goes well.
this problem occurs since my update (2007-10-27).
with a world and kernel from 2007-9-30 this problem was not present.

wpa_supplicant calls libpcap: (a change in libpcap (18-10) could it be
related???

best regards

raoul
rmgls@free.Fr
